text.title: Roadmap Types and Horizon Planning
text.summary: Now/Next/Later vs time-based vs theme-based roadmaps; why to avoid date-based roadmaps for agents.

section.title: Now/Next/Later (Recommended)

rule.statement: Use Now/Next/Later horizon format for roadmap.md. Avoid quarterly dates and specific target months.
rule.rationale: Date-based roadmaps generated by agents introduce false precision — the agent has no knowledge of team velocity, external blockers, or strategic pivots. Now/Next/Later communicates direction without overpromising schedule.

example.code:
## Now (committed, current sprint/month) - Auth system (P0) - Landing page
## Next (planned, next quarter) - Paywall integration - Content CMS
## Later (exploratory, 6-12 months) - AI agents - Mobile app
## Won't Do (This Release) | Feature | Reason | When | |---------|--------|------| | Share Cart URL | Complexity | Phase 3 | | Price Alerts | External dep | Not planned |

section.reference: Full Now/Next/Later roadmap template with Won't-Do section

rule.statement: When using theme-based roadmaps, link every theme to a specific metric or constitution goal. Vacuous themes ("User Growth", "Platform Stability") without metric links provide no prioritization signal.
rule.rationale: Agents produce theme labels that sound strategic but are empty without OKR connections. Requiring metric links forces the theme to carry real business weight.
